requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection & Inverter Approval — AS 4777.2 & CEC
requirement_topic.zh: 电网接入与逆变器审批 — AS 4777.2 及 CEC
requirement_topic.zht: 電網接入與逆變器審批 — AS 4777.2 及 CEC

summary.en: Grid-connected BESS and their associated inverters/power conversion systems (PCS) must comply with AS 4777.2:2020 (Grid Connection of Energy Systems via Inverters — Inverter Requirements). AS 4777.2:2020 includes Australian-specific demand response mode (DRM) requirements and anti-islanding provisions. The inverter and BESS must appear on the Clean Energy Council (CEC) approved product list to qualify for grid-connected installation under most state and territory requirements and to be eligible for Small-scale Technology Certificates (STCs) or feed-in tariff arrangements. A Distribution Network Service Provider (DNSP) connection agreement is required before grid connection. Some states impose additional technical requirements through their DNSP or energy regulator.
summary.zh: 并网 BESS 及其配套逆变器/储能变流器（PCS）须符合 AS 4777.2:2020（通过逆变器将能源系统接入电网——逆变器要求），其中包含澳大利亚特有的需求响应模式（DRM）要求和防孤岛规定。逆变器及 BESS 须列入清洁能源委员会（CEC）认可产品名单，以满足大多数州和领地对并网安装的要求，并具备申请小规模技术证书（STC）或上网电价安排的资格。并网前须取得配电网服务提供商（DNSP）连接协议。部分州通过其 DNSP 或能源监管机构附加额外技术要求。
summary.zht: 併網 BESS 及其配套逆變器/儲能變流器（PCS）須符合 AS 4777.2:2020（通過逆變器將能源系統接入電網——逆變器要求），其中包含澳洲特有的需求回應模式（DRM）要求和防孤島規定。逆變器及 BESS 須列入潔淨能源委員會（CEC）認可產品名單，以滿足大多數州和領地對併網安裝的要求，並具備申請小規模技術證書（STC）或上網電價安排的資格。併網前須取得配電網服務提供商（DNSP）連接協議。部分州通過其 DNSP 或能源監管機構附加額外技術要求。

standards_or_laws: AS 4777.2:2020 — Grid Connection of Energy Systems via Inverters — Part 2: Inverter Requirements
Clean Energy Council (CEC) Approved Products List — batteries and inverters
DNSP connection agreement — required before grid connection in all Australian jurisdictions
National Electricity Rules (NER) — applicable to grid-connected systems

summary.en: China's grid interconnection standard for electrochemical energy storage is GB/T 36558-2022 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems). Inverter requirements follow NB/T 42091 and GB/T 37408. Grid connection approval is handled by the provincial grid company under NDRC and NEA regulations. There is no equivalent to the CEC approved-products administrative step, and Chinese grid-connection test reports referencing GB/T standards are not accepted by Australian DNSPs or the CEC without separate testing to AS 4777.2:2020.
summary.zh: 中国电化学储能并网标准为 GB/T 36558-2022（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）。逆变器要求遵循 NB/T 42091 及 GB/T 37408。并网接入审批由省级电网公司依据国家发改委和国家能源局法规处理。不存在与 CEC 认可产品行政步骤等同的机制，引用 GB/T 标准的中国并网检测报告不被澳大利亚 DNSP 或 CEC 接受，须另行依据 AS 4777.2:2020 进行测试。
summary.zht: 中國電化學儲能併網標準為 GB/T 36558-2022（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）。逆變器要求遵循 NB/T 42091 及 GB/T 37408。併網接入審批由省級電網公司依據國家發改委和國家能源局法規處理。不存在與 CEC 認可產品行政步驟等同的機制，引用 GB/T 標準的中國併網檢測報告不被澳洲 DNSP 或 CEC 接受，須另行依據 AS 4777.2:2020 進行測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2022 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems in power systems)
NB/T 42091 — 并网型光伏逆变器技术规范 (Technical specification for grid-connected PV inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏发电并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical requirements for PV grid-connected inverters)

gap.en: AS 4777.2:2020 includes demand response mode (DRM) requirements that are specific to the Australian market and not present in Chinese grid standards. CEC product approval is a separate administrative step — there is no streamlined path from CQC or Chinese certification to CEC listing. CEC listing requires AS 4777.2:2020-compliant test reports and technical documentation. Grid operator (DNSP) approval must be obtained separately per DNSP. Some DNSPs impose additional technical requirements beyond AS 4777.2:2020. The combination of AS 4777.2 testing, CEC listing, and DNSP approval has no direct parallel in the Chinese domestic approval process.
gap.zh: AS 4777.2:2020 包含澳大利亚市场特有的需求响应模式（DRM）要求，中国电网标准中不存在此类要求。CEC 产品审批是一个独立的行政步骤——没有从 CQC 或中国认证到 CEC 产品目录登记的简化路径。CEC 目录登记须提供符合 AS 4777.2:2020 的测试报告和技术文件。电网运营商（DNSP）审批须按各 DNSP 单独申请。部分 DNSP 在 AS 4777.2:2020 之外附加额外技术要求。AS 4777.2 测试、CEC 目录登记及 DNSP 审批的组合在中国国内审批流程中没有直接对应项目。
gap.zht: AS 4777.2:2020 包含澳洲市場特有的需求回應模式（DRM）要求，中國電網標準中不存在此類要求。CEC 產品審批是一個獨立的行政步驟——沒有從 CQC 或中國認證到 CEC 產品目錄登記的簡化路徑。CEC 目錄登記須提供符合 AS 4777.2:2020 的測試報告和技術文件。電網運營商（DNSP）審批須按各 DNSP 單獨申請。部分 DNSP 在 AS 4777.2:2020 之外附加額外技術要求。AS 4777.2 測試、CEC 目錄登記及 DNSP 審批的組合在中國國內審批流程中沒有直接對應項目。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — AS 4777.2:2020 compliance required for grid-connected inverters; CEC approved-product listing required in most Australian jurisdictions for grid-connected residential and commercial BESS; DNSP connection agreement required before energisation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NB/T 42091 referenced for grid-connected systems; provincial grid company approval required before commissioning

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese-manufactured BESS intended for grid connection in Australia must comply with AS 4777.2:2020 and obtain CEC approved-product listing and DNSP connection approval. Chinese grid-connection certifications referencing GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalents. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 拟在澳大利亚并网的中国制造 BESS 须符合 AS 4777.2:2020，并取得 CEC 认可产品目录登记及 DNSP 连接审批。引用 GB/T 标准的中国并网认证不被接受为等效依据。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或合规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 擬在澳洲併網的中國製造 BESS 須符合 AS 4777.2:2020，並取得 CEC 認可產品目錄登記及 DNSP 連接審批。引用 GB/T 標準的中國併網認證不被接受為等效依據。本資訊僅供一般參考，不構成法律或合規建議。
